personalInfo.name: Darshan
personalInfo.bio: Full stack engineer with 4+ years turning complex data and business requirements into products people actually use  from telecom KPI dashboards to automated data pipelines. I work across React, Node.js, Flask, and PostgreSQL, deploy on Azure, and care as much about clean architecture as I do about the experience on the other side of the screen. Quick to pick up new stacks, comfortable owning things end to end.

experience.description: Built AlgoSensei — an AI-powered DSA and interview prep platform (React, Node.js, Groq/Llama 3.3) shipped end-to-end in 4 weeks. Solved Groq SDK streaming limitations by architecting separate handlers for conversational and structured JSON responses.

Reduced average API response time by 30% by profiling slow queries and restructuring Flask endpoints. Designed and shipped a 26-metric KPI dashboard used daily by executives — PostgreSQL schema, Flask APIs, and React + D3.js frontend. Built a multi-service pipeline (Azure Data Factory → Databricks → PostgreSQL → Flask → React) and automating 75% of manual extraction work and cutting PDF processing time by 70%. Mentored 4–6 junior engineers to independent production delivery.

Reduced dashboard load times by 45% through architecture optimization and code splitting. Redesigned UI components for cross-platform compatibility. Delivered 3+ key frontend projects and improved feature rollout speed by 30%.
Built a full-stack PHP tool to monitor equipment breakdown and system status for the GM Office, digitizing manual paper-based workflows.

aboutTraits.label: Creative
aboutTraits.description: Clay, paint & digital art — design thinking runs deep.

aboutTraits.label: Strategic
aboutTraits.description: Architecture first, syntax second. Systems that scale.
